title: Saint-Etienne appoint Scot Cathro as head coach
summary: Scot Ian Cathro has been appointed as head coach of Ligue 2 club Saint-Etienne following a successful spell with Estoril in Portugal. The move marks a significant milestone for the Scottish coach in French football.
content: Scot Ian Cathro is appointed head coach of Ligue 2 club Saint-Etienne after two successful years in Portugal with Estoril.

zh.title: 圣埃蒂安聘任苏格兰籍卡蒂罗为主教练
zh.summary: 苏格兰籍教练伊恩·卡蒂罗在葡萄牙埃什托里尔执教取得成功后，被任命为法乙联赛球队圣埃蒂安的主教练。这次转变对这位苏格兰籍教练在法国足球界是一个重要的里程碑。

title: FAI tight-lipped on venue switch for Israel game
summary: The Irish Football Association remains noncommittal on details regarding the relocation of their Nations League match against Israel, stating only that discussions on operational aspects will continue. The venue change appears to be a sensitive issue with limited transparency.
content: The Football Association of Ireland [FAI] says it will "continue to meet to discuss the operational aspects" of hosting Israel in the Nations League.

zh.title: 爱尔兰足协对以色列比赛场地变更保持缄默
zh.summary: 爱尔兰足协对民族联赛对阵以色列比赛的迁址细节含糊其辞，仅表示将继续进行关于运营方面的讨论。场地变更似乎是一个敏感问题，透明度有限。

title: Norway dress up as Vikings for World Cup
summary: Norway's national team participated in a Vikings-themed photo shoot ahead of the World Cup, with behind-the-scenes footage capturing the squad's creative preparation. The thematic photo session highlights the team's pre-tournament activities and camaraderie.
content: Watch behind-the-scenes footage as the Norway squad dress up as Vikings for a team photo before the World Cup.

zh.title: 挪威队为世界杯盛装打扮成维京人
zh.summary: 挪威国家队在世界杯前参加了以维京人为主题的照片拍摄，幕后镜头记录了球队的创意准备。这个主题性照片环节展示了球队的赛前活动和队员的凝聚力。

title: Watch: The Monday Night Club
summary: Mark Chapman hosts a weekly football debate program featuring guest analysts discussing the week's major football events and developments.
content: Mark Chapman and guests debate this week's football.

zh.title: 观看：周一晚间俱乐部
zh.summary: 马克·查普曼主持一个每周足球辩论节目，邀请特邀分析员讨论本周主要足球事件和发展。

title: Somali referee Artan barred from entering USA
summary: Somali referee Omar Artan, who would have been the first from his country to officiate at World Cup finals, was denied entry to the United States. The decision prevents a historic milestone for Somali football representation on the global stage.
content: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was set to be the first from his country to officiate at the World Cup finals, is denied entry to the United States.

zh.title: 索马里裁判阿尔坦被禁入境美国
zh.summary: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦原本将成为首个在世界杯决赛中执法的本国裁判，却被拒绝入境美国。这一决定阻止了索马里足球在全球舞台上取得历史性里程碑的机会。

title: WSL 2 side Durham face threat of closure
summary: Theo Walcott and Jermain Defoe revisit England's controversial 2006 World Cup squad selection decisions with Wayne in a retrospective discussion. The conversation examines one of English football's most debated and divisive selection calls.
content: Women's Super League 2 side Durham warn "the club will have to cease operations at all levels" unless a buyer can be found in three weeks.

zh.title: WSL 2球队达勒姆面临关闭威胁
zh.summary: 西奥·沃尔科特和杰梅因·德福与韦恩一起回顾英格兰2006年世界杯争议性阵容选择决定的回顾性讨论。这段对话审视了英格兰足球历史上争议最大、最具分裂性的选人决定之一。

title: Walcott & Defoe’s 2006 World Cup fallout
summary: Former England winger Theo Walcott expresses strong confidence that Marcus Rashford will be a guaranteed starter for the Three Lions at the World Cup. Walcott's enthusiastic endorsement highlights Rashford's perceived importance to England's attacking plans.
content: Walcott, Defoe and Wayne revisit England's most controversial call-up.

zh.title: 沃尔科特与德福的2006年世界杯风波
zh.summary: 英格兰前翼锋西奥·沃尔科特表达了对马库斯·拉什福德必成为三狮军团世界杯首发球员的强烈信心。沃尔科特的热情支持突出了拉什福德对英格兰进攻计划的重要意义。

title: Rashford 'dead cert to start for me' - Walcott
summary: David Sullivan, a billionaire co-owner of West Ham United, faces serious allegations from women who claim he demanded sexual favors in exchange for newspaper features. The accusations raise significant concerns about abuse of power and misconduct within the football club hierarchy.
content: Former England winger Theo Walcott is "most psyched" about Marcus Rashford for the Three Lions at the World Cup.

zh.title: 拉什福德"对我来说绝对会首发" - 沃尔科特
zh.summary: 西汉姆联队亿万富翁联合所有者大卫·沙利文面临多名女性的严重指控，她们声称他要求提供性服务以交换报纸专题报道。这些指控引起了对足球俱乐部管理层权力滥用和不当行为的严重关切。

title: Billionaire West Ham co-owner accused of abusing his power and preying on women for sex
summary: Pep Guardiola's final two seasons managing Manchester City will be documented in a four-part behind-the-scenes series on Amazon Prime Video. The series offers exclusive access to the iconic manager during his tenure with the club.
content: Women say David Sullivan told them they needed to have sex with him to feature in his newspapers.

title: Guardiola's final seasons to air in Amazon series

title: NI squad has exciting future ahead - McKenna
summary: Wales manager Rhian Wilkinson revealed that the team's plane was struck by lightning while traveling to Montenegro for a World Cup qualifier. The incident occurred during the journey before Wales' home match against Czech Republic on Tuesday.
content: Northern Ireland captain Rebecca McKenna says new manager Michael McArdle has "brought a breath of fresh air" since taking over at the helm.

title: Wilkinson reveals Wales plane was hit by lightning
summary: Manchester City continues negotiations with Chelsea regarding the appointment of Enzo Maresca as their new manager. The ongoing talks suggest complex discussions and arrangements surrounding the managerial transition.
content: Boss Rhian Wilkinson says Wales are happy to be at home in Tuesday's Women's World Cup qualifier against Czech Republic after revealing their team plane was struck by lightning en route to Montenegro.

zh.title: 威尔金森透露威尔士飞机遭闪电击中

title: Man City and Chelsea remain in talks over Maresca
summary: Republic of Ireland boss Carla Ward characterizes a potential victory over France as a historic achievement that would secure automatic qualification for the 2027 Women's World Cup. Ward's statement underscores the magnitude of the upcoming challenge for her team.
content: Manchester City are continuing negotiations with Chelsea to appoint Enzo Maresca as their new manager.

zh.title: 曼城和切尔西继续就马雷斯卡进行谈判

title: Beating France would be one of football's biggest stories - Ward
summary: Norway manager Stale Solbakken criticized Scotland manager Steve Clarke as "unprofessional" after Scotland cancelled a pre-World Cup training-ground friendly. The dispute highlights tensions between the two nations in the lead-up to the tournament.
content: Republic of Ireland boss Carla Ward says beating France to qualify automatically for the 2027 Women's World Cup would "be one of the biggest stories in world football".

content: Steve Clarke is branded "unprofessional" by Norway counterpart Stale Solbakken after Scotland cancelled a training-ground friendly before the World Cup.

title: How Emslie went from giving birth to World Cup qualifiers inside six months
summary: Scotland's Claire Emslie returned to competitive football just five months after giving birth and is now pursuing World Cup qualification for Brazil. The achievement underscores elite athletes' physical resilience while managing motherhood.
content: Scotland's Claire Emslie was back playing competitive football just five months after giving birth and is now targeting next year's World Cup finals in Brazil.

zh.title: 埃姆斯利如何在六个月内从生孩子到世界杯预选赛

title: Eriksen 'in good spirits' after collapse
summary: Christian Eriksen is reported to be in good spirits following a collapse during a match against Ukraine and is expected to be discharged from hospital soon, according to Denmark's team doctor.
content: Christian Eriksen is "in good spirits" following his collapse against Ukraine and is expected to be discharged from hospital soon, says Denmark's national team doctor Morten Boesen.

zh.title: 埃里克森晕倒后"精神状态良好"
zh.summary: 根据丹麦队医的说法，克里斯蒂�诺·埃里克森在对乌克兰的比赛中晕倒后，据报道精神状态良好，预计不久将出院。

title: Inside the fairytale journey of Scotland captain Robertson
summary: Andy Robertson's career has progressed from amateur football to the verge of becoming Scotland's most capped men's player as the team's captain. The piece charts his remarkable rise through the ranks of international football.
content: Andy Robertson has come a long way since playing amateur football. Now he is edging towards become Scotland's most capped men's player.

title: Emotion and celebration for Deschamps' home farewell
summary: France manager Didier Deschamps will play his final home match in Lille on Monday before stepping down from his position. The occasion is expected to combine emotional reflection with celebration of his tenure.
content: There will be "emotion and celebration" in Lille on Monday as  manager Didier Deschamps prepares for his last match as France manager on home soil.

zh.title: 德尚主场告别中的情感与庆祝

title: Listen: How have Scotland become a goal machine?
summary: The article examines Scotland's transformation into a prolific goal-scoring team, featuring analysis of key players John McGinn and Ben Gannon-Doak. It explores the tactical and personnel factors behind their improved offensive performance.
content: How have Scotland become a goal machine? Plus we talk John McGinn and Ben Gannon-Doak?

zh.summary: 这篇文章探讨了苏格兰如何转变成一支高效进球的球队，包括对关键球员约翰·麦克吉恩和本·甘农-多克的分析。它探索了他们进攻表现提高背后的战术和人员因素。

title: Mourinho set for Real after Perez re-elected
summary: Jose Mourinho is set to be confirmed as Real Madrid's new head coach following Florentino Perez's re-election as club president until 2030. The appointment marks a significant managerial change for the Spanish club.
content: Jose Mourinho is set to confirmed as Real Madrid's new head coach after Florentino Perez was re-elected as the club's president until 2030.

zh.title: 穆里尼奥在佩雷斯再次当选后将赴皇马
zh.summary: 在弗洛伦蒂诺·佩雷斯作为俱乐部主席再次当选至2030年后，何塞·穆里尼奥将被确认为皇马新任主教练。此次任命标志着这家西班牙俱乐部在管理层面的重大变动。

title: 'Devlin torn between Hearts and big-money offers' - gossip
summary: Midfielder Cammy Devlin faces a difficult choice between renewing his contract with Heart of Midlothian and accepting higher-paying offers from rival clubs. Separately, Robbie Keane has reportedly been told he could eventually become Celtic manager.
content: Cammy Devlin is reportedly emotionally torn between a new Heart of Midlothian contract and rival offers, while Robbie Keane is said to have been told he could yet be Celtic manager some day.

zh.title: "德夫林在中心和高额报价之间摇摆不定"——八卦

summary: Readers are challenged to identify a World Cup star player with minimal clues in this interactive guessing game. The objective is to recognize the athlete in as few attempts as possible.

title: Why Olise can be one of France's very best - Clichy
summary: Former France international Gael Clichy identifies Bayern Munich's Michael Olise as a potential breakout star for France at the upcoming World Cup. Clichy suggests Olise could establish himself as one of France's elite attacking talents this summer.
content: Former France international Gael Clichy explains why Bayern Munich's France forward Michael Olise could be the breakout star of this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 为什么奥利塞可以成为法国最顶级球星之一 - 克利希
zh.summary: 法国前国际球员盖尔·克利希认为拜仁慕尼黑的迈克尔·奥利塞是即将到来的世界杯法国队的潜在新星。克利希表示，奥利塞可能在今年夏天为法国建立自己作为顶级进攻人才的地位。

title: 'Draining' year out makes Roberts appreciate career
summary: Burnley defender Connor Roberts returned to action in Wales' match against Romania after a year-long injury absence. His extended time out has given him renewed appreciation for his career and the opportunity to compete internationally.
content: Burnley defender Connor Roberts returned in Wales' defeat by Romania with a fresh perspective after a "draining" year on the sidelines through injury.

zh.title: 缺阵"令人疲惫"的一年让罗伯茨更珍惜职业生涯
zh.summary: 伯恩利后卫康纳·罗伯茨在缺阵一年后在威尔士对阵罗马尼亚的比赛中重返赛场。这段较长的缺阵时间让他重新认识到自己职业生涯的价值和国际比赛竞争的机会。
